topIngredients.name: Medical-Grade Silicone
topIngredients.benefit: Non-porous material that prevents bacteria buildup between uses

topIngredients.name: Soft Bristle Design
topIngredients.benefit: Prevents over-application pressure that can damage skin

topIngredients.name: Ergonomic Handle
topIngredients.benefit: Allows precise and even mask application with minimal waste

verdict: The Medicube Jelly Brush solves the hygiene problem of finger-applied masks. Food-grade silicone is genuinely more sanitary and reduces product waste. A practical tool for consistent mask users, though limited in functionality.
